series_metadata.series_title: Photographs, Audio & Video Files and Publications
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic and paper files maintained for internal (within agency) and external (public) use. Records may include, but are not limited to: photographs, digital images, prints, negatives, slides, transparencies, and related items; multimedia files in any and all formats including edited audio recordings and video recordings of events, activities, and other occasions for the Ohio Casino Control Commission (OCCC); pamphlets; newsletters; press releases; presentation materials; articles; information updates; posters; forms; uploads to OCCC intranet; and other information use in publications for the OCCC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy converted electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: no longer of current or of administrative value
